name: AI Controls Matrix
description: CSA AI Controls Matrix v1.0.3 — current AICM release. 243 controls across 18 domains, with cross-framework mappings to AI-specific frameworks (BSI AI C4, EU AI Act, ISO/IEC 42001:2023, NIST AI 600-1). Companion to CCM for general-cloud-security controls; AICM adds AI-specific overlays.
relationToCloudSecurity: AICM controls layer on top of cloud-platform controls (covered by CCM). For AI workloads in cloud, both frameworks apply together.
relationToAISecurity: AICM is THE current cloud-industry AI controls catalog. Mapped to the four major AI-specific frameworks listed above. Used in CSA STAR Registry self-assessments for AI services.

license.notes: CSA publications are typically released under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. Confirm specific document license on download page.

current_extraction.notes: Parsed JSON of AICM v1.0.3 with full control set and cross-framework mappings.

notes: Use this version for current AI control assessments.

desired_end_state.notes: Latest AICM version. AICM 1.0.0 is already structured under aicm/1.0.0. Pending decision on whether to also structure 1.0.3 here or whether 1.0.0 is the right anchor version for public-dataset consumers.
